prompt: Add Apache Kafka consumer for processing event streams

turns.content:
<task>
Add a Kafka consumer to process event streams from the events topic.
</task>

arguments.query: confluent-kafka Python consumer example auto offset commit group

turns.content:
1. confluent-kafka-python - https://docs.confluent.io/clients-confluent-kafka-python/current/overview.html
   pip install confluent-kafka. Consumer with subscribe, poll, commit.
2. Kafka Consumer Python Guide - https://docs.confluent.io/platform/current/clients/consumer.html
   Consumer groups, auto.offset.reset, enable.auto.commit.

confluent-kafka Python Client

Consumer:
from confluent_kafka import Consumer

conf = {
    'bootstrap.servers': 'localhost:9092',
    'group.id': 'my-group',
    'auto.offset.reset': 'earliest',
    'enable.auto.commit': False
}
c = Consumer(conf)
c.subscribe(['topic'])

while True:
    msg = c.poll(timeout=1.0)
    if msg is None: continue
    if msg.error():
        print(f'Error: {msg.error()}')
        continue
    print(f'Received: {msg.value().decode()}')
    c.commit(message=msg)

c.close()

arguments.title: confluent-kafka Python consumer
arguments.content:
pip install confluent-kafka
Consumer(config_dict) with bootstrap.servers, group.id, auto.offset.reset
subscribe([topics]), poll(timeout) → Message or None
msg.value().decode(), msg.key(), msg.topic(), msg.partition(), msg.offset()
Manual commit: c.commit(message=msg)
c.close() for graceful shutdown
enable.auto.commit=False for at-least-once processing

arguments.summary: Researched confluent-kafka consumer. Will create consumer with manual commits for at-least-once processing.

next_steps.description: Create src/consumers/event_consumer.py with Kafka consumer and message handler

arguments.message:
Kafka consumer is ready. It uses manual commits for at-least-once processing — messages are only committed after the handler succeeds. Failed messages are logged but don't crash the consumer. Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM.

Usage:
```python
consumer = EventConsumer(['events'], handler=process_event)
consumer.run()
```

Set KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS and KAFKA_GROUP_ID in config.

arguments.summary: Created Kafka event consumer with manual commits, JSON deserialization, error handling, and graceful shutdown via signal handlers.
arguments.final_answer: Kafka consumer implemented with confluent-kafka. Manual commits for at-least-once delivery. Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM. Failed messages logged without crashing. Set KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS and KAFKA_GROUP_ID.
